decision: Choose the smallest collaboration topology that can satisfy the task without increasing drift. High-risk work is human-gated; independent specialist work may run as a parallel DAG; ordered specialist work runs as a sequential chain.

use_when: one specialist can own the task end to end
later work depends on earlier artifacts
review or approval must happen before delivery
merge or synthesis happens after specialist work completes
external side effects or durable memory promotion are possible

drift_controls: Every production run writes a hash-chained run ledger.
Every pause/resume boundary has a checkpoint with state_hash and resume_cursor.
Every cross-Agent handoff has a typed envelope and contract hash.
Every release-critical behavior is covered by deterministic eval cases.

cost_controls.max_parallel_agents_with_cost_awareness: max_parallel_agents 受 cost-control.policy.json rate_limiting.concurrent 约束，两者取较小值
cost_controls.budget_escalation: Agent 预算耗尽时，orchestrator 不可自行提高预算，必须走 human_gate
cost_controls.model_routing_alignment: 复杂任务路由到 strong 模型前，先检查 cost-control.policy.json model_routing 的 max_tokens 限制

observability_controls.trace_every_handoff: 每次 Agent 交接必须记录 agent_handoff span（from/to/contract_hash/acknowledged）
observability_controls.trace_every_node_transition: 每次 controller 节点跳转必须记录 node_span，包含该节点的 required_artifacts 哈希
observability_controls.score_trajectory: 每次评分记录到 observability trace 和 research-integrity-gates.scoring_trajectory_tracking

integrity_controls.gate_precedence: research-integrity-gates 触发时覆盖 quality-scoring.policy.json 的常规评分路由
integrity_controls.block_delivery_on_gate_fail: 任何 integrity_gate 触发时，controller 不可发出 complete 决策

enhancement_source: 基于 getnote+GitHub 调研结果补强，参考 Langfuse/OpenHive/academic-research-skills
